services.projectsSubtitle: A selection of recent web development projects and case studies.
services.projectsEmpty: No projects yet. Check back soon.

q1.q: How long does a typical website project take?
q1.a: Project timelines vary, but typical small-to-medium websites take 2-6 weeks depending on scope.

q2.q: Do you provide hosting and maintenance?
q2.a: Yes — we offer hosting, maintenance, and ongoing support plans tailored to your needs.

q3.q: Can you migrate my existing website?
q3.a: Absolutely — we can migrate content, design, and data from most platforms with minimal downtime.

q4.q: What technologies and platforms do you use?
q4.a: We build with modern web technologies like Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node, and NestJS; and we work with platforms such as Shopify, YouCan, and WordPress. We also use Tailwind CSS, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, Supabase, and other tools tailored to your project needs.

founder.title: Work Directly with the Person Building Your Project
founder.name: Youssef Aarabi
founder.bio: I don't just build websites; I engineer high-performance web applications, SaaS platforms, and custom digital systems designed for technical scalability. When you partner with Yurafy, you work directly with me to transform complex business requirements into fast, reliable products that deliver measurable results.
